data.body:
Goal:
Cheap signal that the project is alive. Helps a reader within 2 seconds.

Verification:
1. README header shows badges for: build (Wave 3 CI), latest release version, Go version (from `go.mod`), license (from K-05).
2. All badges link to authoritative sources (Actions tab, releases page, pkg.go.dev, OSI license page).
3. No vanity badges (no "made with love", no Discord/Slack invite unless they exist).

Constraints:
- Knot ref: K-10; wave/step 1.6; effort S; risk low
- Files: README.md
- Depends on: K-13 (so the build badge has something to point at)
- Notes: K-13 must land before this knot's build badge resolves to a real workflow.
Other badges (license, Go version) work immediately.
data.title: Add status badges to README
